title: Bureau of Democracy, Human Rights, and Labor
text:
Our Mission
The Bureau of Democracy, Human Rights, and Labor (DRL) champions American values, including the rule of law and individual rights, that bring about safer, stronger, and more prosperous states. We advance American security by promoting respect for human rights, bolstering democratic institutions, empowering civil society, promoting and protecting freedom of expression, and upholding internationally recognized worker rights.
Assistant Secretary
Riley M. Barnes
Follow Us: Facebook Facebook X Twitter YouTube YouTube Instagram Instagram
Key Topics
Democracy and Human Rights
Supporting democracy and promoting respect for individual rights promotes fundamental American values and helps create a more secure, stable, and prosperous world.
Learn More About the Bureau of Democracy, Human Rights, and Labor Democracy and Human Rights
International Religious Freedom
The Office of International Religious Freedom promotes universal respect for freedom of religion or belief for all as a core objective of U.S. foreign policy. We monitor religiously motivated abuses, harassment, and discrimination worldwide, and recommend, develop, and implement policies and programs to address these concerns.
Learn More About International Religious Freedom International Religious Freedom
Free Markets and Fair Labor
Protecting worker rights—especially the freedoms of association and collective bargaining through a healthy industrial relations system—is essential to building durable democracies as well as achieving sustainable growth for prosperity and a level playing field for American workers.
Learn More About Free Markets and Fair Labor Free Markets and Fair Labor
Programs and Grants
The Bureau of Democracy, Human Rights, and Labor funds programs in every region of the world to promote human rights, democracy, and transparent and accountable governance.
Learn More About Programs and Grants Programs and Grants
Fact Sheets and Releases
The Bureau of Democracy, Human Rights, and Labor manages and implements a variety of policies and initiatives to support democracy and promote respect for individual rights around the world.
Read Our Fact Sheets and Releases Fact Sheets and Releases
